title: croton pavonis
intro: Croton pavonis, also known as the Croton plant, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae) native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Croton pavonis include its ability to aid in reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a tincture, decoction, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
